name: Artichoke Bottoms with Chipotle Roasted Salmon
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cooked potato, grated or mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and cook medium artichokes: Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Rinse salmon under cold water, pat dry, and rub with pureed chipotle chiles.
3. Place on a lightly oiled baking sheet, season with salt and pepper, and roast in the oven for about 8 minutes or until cooked through. Remove from the oven and let cool.
4. In a bowl, flake the salmon and combine with potato, onion, capers, cilantro, olive oil, and lemon juice. Adjust seasoning as necessary.
5. Pull all of the leaves off the cooked artichoke; set aside. Remove and discard the choke and thistle.
6. Fill each artichoke bottom with the salmon filling and serve.
